name: Polish Sausage and Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Polish sausage, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced cabbage in the crockpot.
2. Toss with diced potato, salt, and caraway seed.
3. Add sliced onion and Polish sausage.
4. Pour chicken broth over all; stir lightly.
5. Cover and cook on Low setting for 8 to 10 hours (on High setting for 2 to 4 hours).
6. This dish is delicious served with mustard, horseradish, and boiled new potatoes.
7. Makes 4 servings (about 3 1/2 quarts).
